examples: We embarked at Shanghai for Qingdao.
Sounds great! The high speed train between Qingdao and Beijing travels faster now.
Mount Lao is one of the most famous mountains in Qingdao.
Haier is a Chinese multinational consumer electronics and home appliances company headquartered in Qingdao, Shandong, China.
Back in China, Pacific Andes is constructing a 3.5-million- square-foot processing complex in Hongdao, near Qingdao.
